compiled_state.title: recipe-executor.sh delegates git stash rollback to adapters instead of owning it per contract
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Summary
SC2 of epic dso-qo0x requires the executor to own git stash rollback on failure. The current implementation delegates rollback to individual adapters (rope-adapter.sh, ts-morph-adapter.sh, isort-adapter.sh) which perform git checkout rollback themselves. REVIEW-DEFENSE comments in adapters acknowledge this is a walking-skeleton deviation.

## Actual Behavior
recipe-executor.sh has no git stash push/pop/drop calls. Rollback is in each adapter script.

## Expected Behavior
Per contract (recipe-engine-adapter.md): executor performs git stash push before adapter invocation and git stash pop/drop after, ensuring uniform rollback regardless of adapter behavior.

## Fix
Add git stash push in recipe-executor.sh before adapter invocation. Add git stash drop/pop after successful run. Remove adapter-level rollback logic (it becomes executor responsibility).
